title: Opening for Production Engineer at Netafim India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Netafim India
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!
